response.justification: The candidate has a strong and extensive background in full-stack web development, microservices, and general software engineering, but completely lacks the required domain expertise for this role. There is no evidence of experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, GPU architectures, or deep-learning workload optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack, mobile, and microservices development.
Proven ability to build and optimize low-latency, high-throughput applications using languages like DLang and C/C++.
Meets the baseline educational requirement with a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science.
concerns: Completely lacks required experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No background in deep neural network (DNN) training, inference optimization, or GPU/SIMD/MIMD architectures.
Career focus is entirely on web, platform, and application development rather than hardware performance architecture.
